description:
Every great shot starts with knowing what worked last time.

Crema Dialed is a premium espresso companion designed for people who care deeply about what's in their cup. Whether you're dialling in a new bag of beans or revisiting a favourite recipe, Crema gives you the tools to make every shot better than the last — quietly, privately, and entirely on your device.

THE EXTRACTION TIMER

At the heart of Crema Dialed is a full-screen guided extraction timer built around the real phases of a shot. As your espresso pulls, gentle haptics mark pre-infusion, first drops and the sweet spot — and alert you the moment blonding begins. It's quiet, moment-by-moment coaching that turns a good shot into a great one.

QUICK LOG. DEEP LOG.

Logging a shot is effortless by default: dose, yield, time and a flavour score in a few taps. When you want to go further, an advanced section opens up grind setting, temperature, ratio and pre-infusion details. Simple when you're in a hurry. Precise when you mean it.

GOLDEN RECIPES THAT REMEMBER

Every bean gets its own Golden Recipe — smart defaults that preload your last successful parameters so you're never starting from scratch. Adjust basket size, dial in your dose, lock in your ratio. Crema remembers what worked so you can build on it.

BEANS AND MACHINE CARE

Manage your coffee inventory with roast-age freshness intelligence, per-bean statistics and a favourites list. Keep your machine in top condition with maintenance reminders for backflushing, descaling, group cleaning, water filter changes and burr cleaning — tracked by time or shot count, never by guesswork.

YOUR CAFÉ JOURNAL

Crema's café check-in feature captures the moments that matter away from home: photos, drink type, a 1-to-10 coffee score and tap-based impression tags. Every café builds its own profile over time, so your travels and tastings always have somewhere to live.

COMPLETELY PRIVATE

There are no accounts, no social feed, no cloud and no tracking. Everything you log — beans, shots, recipes, photos and café visits — stays private on your device, and yours alone. Crema Dialed is your personal coffee companion.

Dial it in.
promotionalText: Master your home espresso with guided shot coaching, smart recipe logging, and a private café journal. No account. No cloud. Just great coffee.
